title: koelzella pabularia
intro: Koelzella pabularia is a plant species, also known as the Yellow Pabularia, which is a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the relief of respiratory problems and the support of the immune system. Koelzella pabularia is often prepared as a herbal tea or a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and is also used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
